caption: Three people are seated on a stage for a panel discussion in front of a dark purple background with glowing pink and purple accents. On the left, a man with dark hair and a beard wears a white button-down shirt and grey trousers. In the center, a woman with blonde hair tied back wears a black t-shirt with white text that reads "EVEN IN LOVE" and black trousers. On the right, a man wears a grey suit jacket and trousers over a light blue shirt. They are seated in tan chairs, and in front of the man on the left is a white, textured, blocky sculptural object. In the background, stylized red and white letters "SL" are visible. Across the sequence, the people remain seated; the woman and the man on the right are engaged in a conversation, while the man on the left looks toward them. There is very little movement between the frames.
